publications.title: Call for evidence: Independent Appeals Body (IAB)
publications.summary: PLP submission raising concerns about the independence of a proposed new Independent Appeals Body for asylum appeals.

publications.title: Collaborative legal approaches for systemic change report

publications.summary: Report drawing on five years of PLP collaboration with community groups to advance shared legal approaches for social change.
